title: Apparatus and method for applying artificial neural network to image encoding or decoding
abstract: The present disclosure relates to video encoding or decoding and, more specifically, to an apparatus and a method for applying an artificial neural network (ANN) to video encoding or decoding. The apparatus and the method of the present disclosure are characterized by applying a CNN-based filter to a first picture and at least one of a quantization parameter map and a block partition map to output a second picture.
claims: 1. An intra-prediction based video decoding method, comprising: decoding, from a bitstream, transform coefficients corresponding to a current block to be decoded in a current picture; configuring an input data using at least one reference area that is included in the current picture and has been decoded prior to the current block, wherein the reference area includes reference pixels in a pre-reconstructed area adjacent to the current block, and the input data is configured using average pixel values which are generated by performing an averaging operation on values of pixels in the reference area; filtering the input data using a filter coefficient set which is in a two or three dimensional matrix form to thereby set the filtered input data as predicted pixels for the current block; generating residual signals for the current block by inversely transforming the transform coefficients; and reconstructing the current block by adding the predicted pixels and the residual signals corresponding thereto, wherein the method further comprises decoding, from the bitstream, first information for selecting the filter coefficient set to apply to the current block among a plurality of filter coefficient sets each of which is in the two or three dimensional matrix form, and wherein the filtering is performed using the filter coefficient set determined based on the first information.
